name: FLAGSTAR BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
summary: PART I General Where we say "we," "us," "our," the "Bank," the "Company," or "Flagstar," in this report we usually mean Flagstar Bank, National Association. Flagstar Bank, National Association, is a national banking association headquartered in Hicksville, New York which had $87.5 billion of assets, $61.0 billion of loans, deposits of $66.0billion, and total stockholders equity of $8.1 billion as of December31, 2025. The Bank went public in 1993 and has grown organically and through a series of ...
